positive: An intricate, stylized depiction of a whimsical woodland creature, combining the silhouette of a majestic stag with bioluminescent elements. The composition is central and symmetrical, featuring the stag emerging from a dense, stylized forest canopy. Use a clean, graphic linework aesthetic combined with smooth, ethereal gradients. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, sapphire blue, neon teal, and glowing emerald green against a matte black background. The overall style is modern mystical, high contrast, and perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Cinematic backlighting emphasizes the glowing antlers and woodland mist, creating strong, crisp silhouettes. Minimalist fantasy, engraved style, clean graphic design, vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grain, watermark, text, logos, signature, amateur, poor anatomy, artifacts, cropped, dirty, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs
